---
title: HubSpot Cheat Sheet
description: Quick-reference guide for all HubSpot lifecycle stages, pipeline flows, and stage-by-stage actions.
date: 2026-03-14
tags: hubspot, cheat-sheet, lifecycle, pipelines, stages, manual-actions, automation, reference
group: maps
---

# HubSpot Cheat Sheet

## Lifecycle Stages

100% Automated. Attached to the Contact.

| Lifecycle Stage | When it is Assigned (Automatically) | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Mountain Lead | When an inquiry is submitted (i.e. a form is submitted) | |
| Mountain Opportunity | When an inquiry (form submission) becomes a call. Inbound calls are automatically "Mountain Opportunities". | |
| Mountain Customer | When a guest books their first stay. | Stay = "Closed Won" Deal. |
| Mountain Evangelist | When a guest has stayed multiple times. | Stay = "Closed Won" Deal. |
| Mountain Cold Customer | When a guest stay has passed and no new stays are booked within 90 days. Deals are automatically Marked "COLD" & task is set for Deal Owner. | Stay = "Closed Won" Deal. |
| Mountain Not Qualified | Not Qualified Stage & Dropdown Selected: Physically Not Able to Visit Property, Only Travels with kids/pets, Disability($) | If you feel there are other common scenarios where a lead becomes disqualified, let Kara B. know and it can be added to the list of options. |
| Blacklisted | Manually or Automatically Marked as 'Do Not Contact' | |

## Pipeline Flow

100% Automatically Moved between Pipelines.

| Pipeline | Who? | Teams |
|---|---|---|
| Mountain-Reservation Pipeline | Guests who are looking to stay with us for the first time. | Setters, Closers, Admin |
| Mountain-Past Guest Pipeline | Guests who have stayed with us and are NOT a part of the rebooking program. | Setters, Closers, Admin |
| Mountain-Rebooking Program Pipeline | Guests a part of our rebooking program or eligible for it. | Hosts, Admin |
| Mountain-Nurturing Pipeline | Opportunities that did not book. | Setters, Closers, Admin |
| Mountain-Upsell Pipeline | Booked Stays. | Guest Experience, Spa Team, Setters, Closers, Admin |
| Mountain-Recover Pipeline | Stays that have requested cancellation/rescheduling. | Closers, Admin |
| Mountain-Not Qualified Pipeline | Not Qualified via Dropdown | None |
| Blacklisted | Do Not Contact | None |

## Reservation Pipeline

**Who:** Guests who are looking to stay with us for the first time.
**Team:** Setters, Closers, Admin
Semi-automatic/Manually Moved between Stages.

| Stage | Manual Actions | Automatic Actions | Team | Lifecycle Stage |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| INQUIRY MADE | Setter (Stephanie) calls to get a Call Booked with Sales Team. Deal Property to Fill: Manually Set "Setter Assigned" | Auto moves to "Booked Call" Stage when a Meeting is Scheduled via Hubspot. | Setter / Marketing | Mountain Lead |
| PROMO DEPOSIT PAID | Setter (Stephanie) calls to get a Call Booked with Sales Team. Deal Property to Fill: "Setter Assigned" | Pay Deposit via landing page or contact property "Rebooking Deposit" checked 'yes'. Deal automatically moves to Promo Deposit Paid. Automatically Moved to "Booked Call" if a Call is booked by guest. | Sales Team / Marketing | Mountain Customer |
| BOOKED CALL | | Automatic when call is Set on Sales Team Calendar. | Sales Team | Mountain Opportunity |
| NO SHOW | Sales Team Move Deal to Stage: "No Show". Deal Properties to Fill: "Deal Owner" & "Deal Source". Stephanie moves Deal back to "Booked Call" Stage once you set call and Fill Deal Property "Setter Assigned" | Automatically Sets Task for Stephanie to Chase. | Setter | Mountain Opportunity |
| QUOTE | Sales Team Move Deal to Stage: "Quote". Deal Property to Fill: "Check In Date", "Check Out Date", "Quote Amount", & "Quote Expiry Date" | Automatically Sets Task for Deal Owner to follow up with guest (in 8 hours) & Sets Task to Cancel quote in SNT & Move the Deal to "CL-Nurturing" Stage in Pipeline. | Sales Team | Mountain Opportunity |
| CL-NURTURING | Sales Team Move Deal to Stage: "CL-Nurturing". Deal Property to Fill: "Close Loss Reason" | Automatically Creates New Deal in "Mountain-Nurturing Pipeline" | Sales Team / Marketing | Mountain Opportunity |
| CL-NOT QUALIFIED | Sales Team Move Deal to Stage: "CL-Not Qualified". Deal Property to Fill: "Not Qualified Reason" | | None | Mountain Not Qualified |
| CL-BLACKLISTED | Sales Team Move Deal to Stage: "CL-Blacklisted". Deal Property to Fill: "Do Not Contact" | | None | Blacklisted |
| PENDING APPROVAL | Deal Property to Fill: "Deal Owner", "Deal Source", "SNT Reservation Number", "Closed Won Reason", "Gross Revenue", "Revenue Less Taxes & Fees", "Cash Collected", "Check-In", "Check-Out Date" | Automatically Tasks Admin to Reconcile with SNT | Admin | Mountain Customer |
| CLOSED WON | Admin Move Deal to Stage: "Closed Won". Deal Property to Fill: "SNT Reconciled" | Recorded in Reports & Dashboards Automatically. Automatically Creates Deal in "Upsell" Pipeline. Automatically Creates Deal in "Rebooking Program" Pipeline. Automatically Sets Task for Deal Owner for 265 days to book their 1 year Bolt Farm Anniversary Special. | Admin | Mountain Customer |
| CANCELLED | Whoever Handles Request will move "Closed Won" deal to "Cancelled" Stage. Deal Properties to Fill: "Cancellation/Reschedule Requested", "Cancellation/Reschedule Reason", "Refunded", "Refund Amount" | Automatically moves deal to "Recover Pipeline" | All | Mountain Lead |

## Past Guest Pipeline

**Who:** Guests who have stayed with us and are NOT a part of the rebooking program.
**Team:** Setters, Closers, Admin
Semi-automatic/Manually Moved between Stages.

| Stage | Manual Actions | Automatic Actions | Team | Lifecycle Stage |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| PENDING CHECK-IN | | Automatically moves to next stage on Check-Out. | | Mountain Customer |
| <14-days since last stay | | Automatic task set for Stephanie to set closers on a call. Automatically Moves to next stage after 14 days. | | Mountain Customer |
| <90 Days since last Stay | | Automatically moves to next stage after 90 days. | | Mountain Customer |
| COLD-Customer | | Deal name is automatically updated to COLD & deal owner is tasked with a follow-up. | | Mountain Customer |
| PROMO DEPOSIT PAID | Setter (Stephanie) calls to get a Call Booked with Sales Team. Deal Property to Fill: "Setter Assigned" | Pay Deposit via landing page or contact property "Rebooking Deposit" checked 'yes'. Deal automatically moves to Promo Deposit Paid. Automatically Moved to "Booked Call" if a Call is booked by guest. | Sales Team / Marketing | Mountain Customer |
| BOOKED CALL | | Automatic when call is Set on Sales Team Calendar. Deal Property: "Last Stay Date" | Sales Team | Mountain Customer |
| NO SHOW | Sales Team Move Deal to Stage: "No Show". Deal Properties to Fill: "Deal Owner" & "Deal Source". Stephanie moves Deal back to "Booked Call" Stage once you set call and Fill Deal Property "Setter Assigned" | Automatically Sets Task for Stephanie to Chase. | Setter | Mountain Customer |
| QUOTE | Sales Team Move Deal to Stage: "Quote". Deal Property to Fill: "Check In Date", "Check Out Date", "Quote Amount", & "Quote Expiry Date" | Automatically Sets Task for Deal Owner to follow up with guest (in 8 hours) & Sets Task to Cancel quote in SNT & Move the Deal to "CL-Nurturing" Stage in Pipeline. | Sales Team | Mountain Customer |
| CL-NURTURING | Sales Team Move Deal to Stage: "CL-Nurturing". Deal Property to Fill: "Close Loss Reason" | Automatically Creates New Deal in "Mountain-Nurturing Pipeline" | Sales Team / Marketing | Mountain Customer |
| CL-NOT QUALIFIED | Sales Team Move Deal to Stage: "CL-Not Qualified". Deal Property to Fill: "Not Qualified Reason" | | None | Mountain Not Qualified |
| CL-BLACKLISTED | Sales Team Move Deal to Stage: "CL-Blacklisted". Deal Property to Fill: "Do Not Contact" | | None | Blacklisted |
| PENDING APPROVAL | Deal Property to Fill: "Deal Owner", "Deal Source", "SNT Reservation Number", "Closed Won Reason", "Gross Revenue", "Revenue Less Taxes & Fees", "Cash Collected", "Check-In", "Check-Out Date" | Automatically Tasks Admin to Reconcile with SNT | Admin | Mountain Customer |
| CLOSED WON | Admin Move Deal to Stage: "Closed Won". Deal Property to Fill: "SNT Reconciled" | Recorded in Reports & Dashboards Automatically. Automatically Creates Deal in "Upsell" Pipeline. Automatically Creates Deal in "Rebooking Program" Pipeline. | Admin | Mountain Evangelist |
| CANCELLED | Whoever Handles Request will move "Closed Won" deal to "Cancelled" Stage. Deal Properties to Fill: "Cancellation/Reschedule Requested", "Cancellation/Reschedule Reason", "Refunded", "Refund Amount" | Automatically moves deal to "Recover Pipeline" | All | Mountain Customer OR Evangelist |

## Rebooking Program Pipeline

**Who:** Guests a part of our rebooking program or eligible for it.
**Team:** Hosts & Admin
Semi-automatic/Manually Moved between Stages.

| Stage | Manual Actions | Automatic Actions | Team | Lifecycle Stage |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| REBOOKING-CHECKED-IN | Setter (Stephanie) calls to get a Call Booked with Sales Team. Deal Property to Fill: Manually Set "Setter Assigned" | Automatically transfers their check-out date. (Hosts will update if they sell them an entire stay.) Auto moves to "Booked Call" Stage when a Meeting is Scheduled via Hubspot. | Hosts | Mountain Lead |
| EXPIRED (Check-Out) | | Automatically moves to expired upon check-out. Tasks admin to delete. (Currently Kara) | Hosts / Sales Team | |
| PENDING APPROVAL | Sales Team Move Deal to Stage: "CW-Pending Approval". Deal Property to Fill: "Deal Owner", "Deal Source"-On Site, "SNT Reservation Number", "Closed Won Reason", "Gross Revenue", "Revenue Less Taxes & Fees", "Cash Collected", "Check-In", "Check-Out Date" | Automatically Tasks Admin to Reconcile with SNT | Admin | Mountain Customer |
| CLOSED WON | Admin Move Deal to Stage: "Closed Won". Deal Property to Fill: "SNT Reconciled" | Recorded in Reports & Dashboards Automatically. Automatically Creates Deal in "Upsell" & "Past Guest" Pipeline (Sarah to set owner to match contact owner). Automatically Creates Deal in "Rebooking Program" Pipeline upon Check-In. | Admin | Mountain Customer |
| CANCELLED | Whoever Handles Request will move "Closed Won" deal to "Cancelled" Stage. Deal Properties to Fill: "Cancellation/Reschedule Requested", "Cancellation/Reschedule Reason" (Include what was refunded here if applicable.), "Refunded", "Refund Amount" | Automatically moves deal to "Recover Pipeline" | All | Mountain Customer / Evangelist |

## Nurturing Pipeline

**Who:** Opportunities that did not book.
**Team:** Setters, Closers, Admin
Semi-automatic/Manually Moved between Stages.

| Stage | Manual Actions | Automatic Actions | Team | Lifecycle Stage |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| FOLLOW-UP NEEDED | Setter (Stephanie) calls to get a Call Booked with Sales Team. Deal Property to Fill: Manually Set "Setter Assigned". OR Deal Owner chases to get Call Booked / SMS Nurturing | Auto moves to "Booked Call" Stage when a Meeting is Scheduled via Hubspot. | Setter / Sales Team | Mountain Lead / Customer |
| BOOKED CALL | Sales Team BAMFAMS on Original Call. | Automatically moves to this stage when "SDR: Upcoming Meeting" is checked (i.e. upcoming meeting is booked to start within 90 days) on Contact Card. | Sales Team | Mountain Opportunity / Customer |
| NO SHOW | Sales Team Move Deal to Stage: "No Show". Deal Properties to Fill: "Deal Owner" & "Deal Source". Stephanie moves Deal back to "Booked Call" Stage once you set call and Fill Deal Property "Setter Assigned" | Automatically Sets Task for Stephanie to Chase. | Setter | Mountain Opportunity |
| QUOTE | Sales Team Move Deal to Stage: "Quote". Deal Property to Fill: "Check In Date", "Check Out Date", "Quote Amount", & "Quote Expiry Date" | Automatically Sets Task for Deal Owner to follow up with guest (in 8 hours) & Sets Task to Cancel quote in SNT & Move the Deal to "Follow-Up Needed"/"Booked Call" Stage in Nurturing Pipeline. | Sales Team | Mountain Opportunity |
| CL-NURTURING | Sales Team Move Deal to Stage: "CL-Nurturing". Deal Property to Fill: "Close Loss Reason" | Automatically Creates New Deal in "Mountain-Nurturing Pipeline" - "Follow-Up Needed"/"Booked Call" Stage | Sales Team | Mountain Opportunity |
| CL-NOT QUALIFIED | Sales Team Move Deal to Stage: "CL-Not Qualified". Deal Property to Fill: "Not Qualified Reason" | Automatically Sets Lifecycle Stage. | None | Mountain Not Qualified |
| CL-BLACKLISTED | Sales Team Move Deal to Stage: "CL-Blacklisted". Deal Property to Fill: "Do Not Contact" | Automatically Sets Lifecycle Stage. | None | Blacklisted |
| PENDING APPROVAL | Sales Team Move Deal to Stage: "Pending Approval". Deal Property to Fill: "Deal Owner", "Deal Source", "SNT Reservation Number", "Closed Won Reason", "Gross Revenue", "Revenue Less Taxes & Fees", "Cash Collected", "Check-In", "Check-Out Date" | Automatically Tasks Admin to Reconcile with SNT | Admin | Mountain Customer |
| CLOSED WON | Admin Move Deal to Stage: "Closed Won". Deal Property to Fill: "SNT Reconciled" | Recorded in Reports & Dashboards Automatically. Automatically Creates Deals in "Upsell" & "Past Guest" Pipeline. Automatically Creates Deal in "Rebooking Program" Pipeline. Automatically Sets Task for Deal Owner for 265 days to book their 1 year Bolt Farm Anniversary Special. | Admin | Mountain Customer |
| CANCELLED | Whoever Handles Request will move "Closed Won" deal to "Cancelled" Stage. Deal Properties to Fill: "Cancellation/Reschedule Requested", "Cancellation/Reschedule Reason" (Include what was refunded here if applicable.), "Refunded", "Refund Amount" | Automatically moves deal to "Recover Pipeline" | All | Mountain Customer / Evangelist |

## Upsell Pipeline

**Who:** Booked Stays.
**Team:** Guest Experience, Spa Team, Setters, Closers, Admin
Semi-automatic/Manually Moved between Stages.

| Stage | Manual Actions | Automatic Actions | Team | Lifecycle Stage |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| STAY BOOKED | Closers should BAMFAM their upsell call when they book the stay. | Auto create one deal for Sales Team & Nadine's Team (aka Akia Upsells). Automatically saves SNT Reservation Number, Deal Owner (Except Nadine's Team Deals), Deal Source=Concierge Call (Except Nadine's Team Deals), Check-In & Check-Out Dates, and all attribution Data to the new deal in Upsell. Auto moves to "Booked Call" Stage if a Meeting is Scheduled via Hubspot. | Deal Owner | Mountain Customer / Evangelist |
| BOOKED CALL | | Automatically moves to this stage when "SDR: Upcoming Meeting" is checked (i.e. upcoming meeting is booked to start within 90 days) on Contact Card. | Sales Team | Mountain Customer / Evangelist |
| NO SHOW | Sales Team Move Deal to Stage: "No Show". Deal Properties to Fill: "Deal Owner" & "Deal Source" | Automatically moved to "Inquiry Expired" once Check-In/Check-Out has Passed. | None | Mountain Customer / Evangelist |
| Expired (Check-In/Check-Out) | | Auto assigns task to admin to delete deals. (Right Now Kara) | | |
| PENDING APPROVAL | Sales Team Move Deal to Stage: "CW-Pending Approval". Deal Property to Fill: "Deal Owner", "Deal Source", "SNT Reservation Number", "Closed Won Reason", "Gross Revenue", "Revenue Less Taxes & Fees", "Cash Collected", "Check-In", "Check-Out Date" | Automatically Tasks Admin to Reconcile with SNT | Admin | Mountain Customer / Evangelist |
| CLOSED WON | Admin Move Deal to Stage: "Closed Won". Deal Property to Fill: "SNT Reconciled" | Automatically Recorded in Dashboards. | Admin | Mountain Customer / Evangelist |
| CANCELLED | Whoever Handles Request will move "Closed Won" deal to "Cancelled" Stage. Deal Properties to Fill: "Cancellation/Reschedule Requested", "Cancellation/Reschedule Reason" (Include what was refunded here if applicable.), "Refunded", "Refund Amount" | Automatically moves deal to "Recover Pipeline" | All | Mountain Customer / Evangelist |

## Recover Pipeline

**Who:** Stays that have requested cancellation/rescheduling.
**Team:** Sales Team
Semi-automatic/Manually Moved between Stages.

| Stage | Manual Actions | Automatic Actions | Team | Lifecycle Stage |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Reschedule/Cancellation Requested | Deal Owner needs to Contact ASAP. | Task is set for OG deal owner when deal is moved to this pipeline. | Sales Team | Mountain Opportunity/Customer/Evangelist |
| BOOKED CALL | | | Sales Team | Mountain Opportunity/Customer/Evangelist |
| NO SHOW | Sales Team Move Deal to Stage: "No Show". Continue Nurturing as you see fit. | | Sales Team | Mountain Opportunity/Customer/Evangelist |
| PENDING APPROVAL | Sales Team Move Deal to Stage: "Pending Approval". Deal Property to Fill: "SNT Confirmation #", "Recover_Call_Result" (see details below). | Automatically Tasks Admin to Reconcile with SNT | Admin | Mountain Opportunity/Customer/Evangelist |
| CLOSED WON | Admin Move Deal to Stage: "Closed Won". Deal Property to Fill: "SNT Reconciled" | Recorded in Reports & Dashboards Automatically. | Admin | Mountain Customer/Evangelist |
| CLOSED LOST | Admin Move Deal to Stage: "Closed Lost" & Delete "Upsell" & "Past Guest" Deals associated to contact. Deal Property to Fill: "SNT Reconciled" | Tasked to Finance | Admin | Mountain Opportunity/Customer/Evangelist |

### Recover Pipeline - Pending Approval: Recover_Call_Result Options

- **Closed Won - Downgraded** (revenue generated changed): If only revenue changed, update "Generated Revenue" & "Gross Revenue". If revenue changed & a refund was needed, update "Cash Collected", "Refund", & "Refund Amount".
- **Closed Won - Reschedule (no fee)**: Update "Check-In Date" & "Check-Out Date".
- **Closed Won - Reschedule (10% fee charged)**: Update "Check-In Date", "Check-Out Date", "Gross Revenue", and "Generated Revenue" & Create additional Payment Object in the amount of the fee.
- **Closed Won - No Change**
- **Closed Won - 50% Policy** (45 days before stay): Update "Gross Revenue", "Generated Revenue" & if refund granted adjust "Refund", "Refund Amount" & "Cash Collected".
- **Closed Lost - 48 Hr Cancel**: Fill in "Refund" & "Refund Amount".
- **Closed Lost - Full Refund** (extenuating circumstances): Do not adjust deal object, note "Refund" and "Refund Amount".

> **Golden Rule:** If deal holds any revenue it is always Closed Won (for Dashboard reporting purposes).
